commit.message:
fix: add TRY_HARDER hint and request 1080p for faster barcode detection

TRY_HARDER increases ZXing's sampling density per frame. Requesting
1920x1080 gives more pixels per barcode bar, making linear codes easier
to decode. Browser falls back to whatever the camera supports if 1080p
is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: polls display - fallback to direct options when poll_questions empty

options array instead of showing "Aucun sondage disponible"

fix: Revert middleware to admin-only — broad matcher was adding latency

The expanded middleware matcher ran NextAuth session checks on every
public page request, adding server-side latency to all pages. Reverted
to only matching /admin/* routes.

fix: use lemonsqueezy-button class approach for checkout overlay

Url.Open() was redirecting instead of showing overlay. Switch to the
documented primary approach: create a hidden <a> with class
"lemonsqueezy-button" and programmatically click it. lemon.js
automatically intercepts clicks on these elements and opens the
checkout as an in-app overlay.

commit.message:
fix: restrict barcode scanner to UPC/EAN formats for faster detection

Default BrowserMultiFormatReader scans all ~20 formats per frame.
Limiting to UPC-A, UPC-E, EAN-13, EAN-8 eliminates irrelevant format
overhead and significantly improves detection speed on mobile hardware.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix result overlay re-opening on navigation back to mine page

resultShown was component-local state that reset to null on unmount.
When navigating back, the effect saw lastResult as "new" and re-opened
the modal. Now persists the last shown result ID in sessionStorage so
it survives component remounts across page navigation.

commit.message:
feat(auth): integrate useEdition with Supabase auth tier

Phase 5 - Edition + Auth Integration:
- Import useAuthStore in useEdition composable
- canAccess() now checks in order:
  1. Server feature flags from auth store (if authenticated)
  2. Auth tier (Pro users get Pro features)
  3. Local edition fallback
- isPro computed now includes authStore.isPro check

When authenticated, tier-based features use server truth from
/api/auth/tier endpoint. Falls back to local edition when offline
or unauthenticated.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: load lemon.js statically in root layout for checkout overlay

The overlay wasn't working because lemon.js was loaded dynamically
right before Url.Open(), which didn't give it time to initialize.
Now loaded statically via next/script in the root layout so it's
ready on every page. The helper calls createLemonSqueezy() before
each Url.Open() to re-initialize after SPA navigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-detect cluster domain via Ingress CR lookup, fix AWS external-secrets

Replace hardcoded domain values across all charts with runtime lookup of
the Ingress CR (config.openshift.io/v1), making charts portable across
clusters without configuration changes.

Replace Infrastructure CR status.platform lookup (which fails in ArgoCD
Helm rendering) with explicit aws.enabled flag for external-secrets AWS
resources, enabled via values-aws.yaml overlay.

commit.message:
fix: move workflow to repo root .github/workflows/ and set working-directory

GitHub Actions requires workflows at the repository root, not in subdirectories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: create Symfony .env file on first launch before composer install

Symfony's post-install cache:clear script requires a .env file to exist.
On a fresh clone, app/.env is gitignored and missing, causing composer
install to fail with a PathException. The entrypoint now creates a
minimal .env before running composer install.

fix: use decodeFromConstraints to trigger camera permission prompt in Firefox

listVideoInputDevices returns empty before permission is granted, causing the
scanner to immediately show the no_camera error state. Switching to
decodeFromConstraints with facingMode: environment lets the browser prompt
for permission first, and also selects the rear camera on mobile automatically.

commit.message:
Fix: combine lender+category into single UPDATE with RETURNING clause

Single UPDATE documents SET lender=$1, category=$2 WHERE id=$3
RETURNING id, lender, category — so the response confirms what was written.

Fix spark language detection: English input no longer goes to Finnish slot

Add detectLang() to useSparkMutations that checks for Finnish characters
(ä/ö/å) and common Finnish words. When creating a spark, content and title
are now stored in the correct content_fi/content_en and title_fi/title_en
fields based on detected language.

Also fixes LandingSparkCard to show the correct FI/EN buttons and translate
in the right direction based on which language fields are populated.

cd: make PROD deploy health check non-blocking, reduce timeout to 60s

The Harness delegate cannot reach external URLs, so the health

warn and continue — Render deploys automatically via GitHub
integration. Also reduced timeout from 300s to 60s since the
delegate connectivity issue is apparent within seconds.

feat: MMS photo intake — callers reply with job site photos after intake

After Maria completes a call with intake data, the caller gets a text
asking for photos of the job site. Photos are matched to the intake,
attached to the job card, and the owner is notified. Dramatically
increases lead quality for estimate accuracy.

- Migration 0051: intake_attachments table + job_cards photo_count column
- Photo request service: bilingual SMS sent 2 min after call ends
- Inbound photo handler: matches MMS to recent intakes within 48h window
- Twilio webhook: MMS detection before owner reply + existing handlers
- Dashboard: photo gallery in job card detail with lazy-loaded thumbnails
- Daily digest: photo counts shown in lead summaries (SMS + email)
- Admin: total photos stat in job cards tab
- Images only (jpeg/png/gif/webp/heic) — video skipped for MVP
- Uses Twilio-hosted URLs directly — stored_url column for future storage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: auto-populate tasks in newly generated fiscal year boards

When generateFiscalYearBoards creates new monthly boards, it now
automatically copies tasks from the most recent previous board that
has task instances. This ensures recurring tasks (like PNL reviews)
appear in new boards without requiring the previous board to be
marked as complete.

Also adds seed script for TMG Construction PNL review tasks
(Jan 2023 - Mar 2026).

commit.message:
fix: resilient embedding job — handle Neon connection timeouts

- Add retry logic (2 retries with backoff) for connection errors
- Detect connection errors (timeout, reset, hang up) and self-chain
  to get fresh DB connection in new invocation
- Replace $transaction with concurrent Promise.all upserts to avoid
  holding a single connection open for entire batch
- Reduce time budget from 4min to 3min for safety margin
- Track progress in Redis (lastBatchAt, generated, remaining)
- Stats endpoint returns lastBatchAt for monitoring
- 3 consecutive connection failures → job stops with error state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fix createPinIcon missing zoom argument that broke Vercel deployment

commit.message:
feat: barcode scanning for Add Movie form

Scan button opens a camera viewfinder (BrowserMultiFormatReader from @zxing/browser,
cross-browser, prefers rear camera). Detected UPC hits /api/barcode which checks
barcode_cache, falls back to UPCitemdb + TMDB, and caches the result. On match all
form fields are pre-filled identically to TMDB autocomplete selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ui): replace hardcoded grays with theme tokens across all pages

Audit all pages for hardcoded gray/slate colors and replace with CSS
variable tokens (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted,
border-border, etc.) for proper light/dark mode support. Add ThemeToggle
to landing, login, and register pages. Add light mode overrides for
glass-card, btn-secondary, and card-hover components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: write lender/category directly to documents table instead of map tables

The map table approach failed because presigned URLs contain %20-encoded
spaces but decodeURIComponent produced literal spaces, so LIKE joins
never matched.

Now the PATCH endpoint does a simple UPDATE on the documents table
(which already has a category column, and lender will be added).
The bulk GET reads d.lender and d.category directly — no joins needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive security, data integrity, and code quality fixes

P0 Security:
- Add organizationId to all request update/delete where clauses (10 calls
  across 6 files) to prevent cross-org data access via race conditions
- Replace 42 unsafe `as any` casts with proper types (Prisma.InputJsonValue,
  typed interfaces, Record<string, unknown>) across 19 files

P1 Data Integrity:
- Wrap board creation duplicate-check + create in prisma.$transaction()
  to prevent race condition duplicates
- Add organizationId filter to reminderState, reportDefinition, and
  timeline queries (5 files) to prevent cross-org data access
- All findFirst/findUnique calls verified to have null checks (no fixes needed)
- All fire-and-forget async calls verified to have .catch() handlers (no fixes needed)

P2 Performance:
- Wrap carry-over-tasks bulk creation in transaction for atomicity
- Wrap generated-report viewer creation in transaction
- Add try-catch around board generation in GET /api/boards so generation
  failures don't prevent listing existing boards

P3 Tech Debt:
- Sanitize 6 API error responses that leaked Prisma error.code/error.meta
- Add TODO comment on debug user creation in signup route
- Add @@index([requestId, organizationId]) to ReminderState model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add optimistic UI and injected message bubbles for chat

Use flushSync to render user messages instantly before IPC
serialization blocks the main thread. Injected messages sent
while the agent is streaming now appear as separate purple
user bubbles instead of inline markdown text within the
assistant's turn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ESLint errors — reduced-motion init, effect deps, remove unused constant

- usePrefersReducedMotion: use lazy initializer instead of sync setState in effect
- HeroVisual: add feedItems.length and agents.length to effect dependency arrays
- Remove unused payingClients from METRICS constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add provinces overlay to ChallengeMap

Adds a 'Toon provincies' checkbox to the map control panel that toggles a GeoJSON province border layer (black stroke, always on top) retrieved from the map service.
